title: Team Medic Recounts Iran’s ‘Stressful’ World Cup Debut in L.A.
summary_full: A member of Iran’s medical team says the team endured delays, multiple security searches and a rushed exit, frustrating players and officials.
summary_public: A member of Iran’s medical team says the team endured delays, multiple security searches and a rushed exit, frustrating players and officials.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: endured delays, multiple security searches and a rushed exit
